positive: Stylized, minimalist vector art composition of a group of interconnected, whimsical natural elements: a celestial crescent moon cradling a stylized forest scene with delicate glowing bioluminescent flora, entwined with geometric vine patterns and forming a protective circle. The style should be modern celestial boho, using strong black outlines against a muted, distressed cream background. Color palette restricted to deep indigo blue, antique gold accents, and moss green, providing high contrast and excellent silhouette definition. Central, symmetrical composition optimized for placement on a chest print, featuring smooth, clean, non-photorealistic lines suitable for screen printing or single-color apparel printing. Artwork must have clear depth and visual hierarchy, suitable for all demographics.
negative: text, signature, watermark, blurry, lowres, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, realistic photo, logo, brand, copyright, celebrity
